Off Calendar Jun-05-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: Confirmation Of Compliance With Court's Orders of May-23-2014 is OFF CALENDAR per Plaintiff's Request. Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)

Notice Of Motion To Enforce Injunction, Appoint Receiver, And Impose Civil Penalties
Off Calendar May-23-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:

Megan Cesare-Eastman, Deputy City Attorney (415-554-3970), counsel for plaintiff/moving party
David B. Tillotson, Esq. of Flynn Riley et al. LLP, (415-591-1150), counsel for defendant/opposing party

Court hears arguments from both sides. Court rules now as follows: Objections to supplemental pleadings are SUSTAINED. Pleadings are unauthorized, late and are stricken. PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's Motion To Enforce Injunction, Appoint Receiver, And Impose Civil Penalties is in part GRANTED and in part DENIED as follows: as to appointment of receiver the motion is DENIED; as to extension of preliminary injunction, the motion is granted with the length of time TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION; as to both civil penalties and attorneys' fees the motion is GRANTED with the amounts TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

This action is continued for confirmation of compliance on June 5, 2014 at 9:30 a.m. in Department 501.

Notice Of Motion To Enforce Injunction, Appoint Receiver, And Impose Civil Penalties
Off Calendar May-07-2014 Continued To May-23-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Megan Cesare-Eastman, Deputy City Attorney (415-554-3970), for plaintiff/moving party City and County of San Francisco
David B. Tillotson, Esq. of Flynn Riley Bailey & Pasek, LLC, for defendant/opposing party Sophie Lau

Court hears arguments from both sides. The parties are directed to meet and confer regarding amounts, form and content of proposed written order. Both sides request continuance.

Court rules now as follows: PLAINTIFFS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AND PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIAS' Motion To Enforce Injunction, Appoint Receiver, And Impose Civil Penalties is continued to May 23, 2014 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 501 for further hearing.
